creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Pedro F. Giffuni from comment #2)
> This patch is rather outdated but it still works.
> I recall I got a go ahead to commit this a while ago but there was no public
> record.
> 
> Glen can I go ahead and commit it?

Please go ahead.  I completely forgot about it (and it somehow did not show up in my list of PRs assigned to me, which is probably due to a filter).
